allow: Bash(npm install -D eslint @eslint/js typescript-eslint prettier eslint-config-prettier)
Bash(gh repo create Xarra-Books-Management-System --private --source=. --push --description "Bespoke publishing management system for Xarra Books \(South African publisher\)")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=xarra psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U xarra -d xarra -c "DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;")
Bash(docker exec xarra-postgres psql -U xarra -d xarra -c "DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;")
Bash(docker exec xarra-postgres psql -U xarra -d xarra -c "DELETE FROM users WHERE email = ''admin@xarrabooks.com'';")
Bash(docker exec xarra-postgres psql -U xarra -d xarra -c "\\dt")
Bash(docker exec xarra-postgres psql -U xarra -d xarra -c ":*)
Bash(docker exec xarra-postgres psql -U xarra -d xarra -c "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS verification, account, session, ""user"" CASCADE;")
